name: @warp-lang/commerce-runtime
description: A reference, self-host durable-execution runtime for the Warp commerce model — feed it proposed commerce actions, it runs each through createSession + guardAction, persists an append-only audit log (in-memory or file-backed), and can replay the log to reproduce the same final state. It runs the model and logs verdicts; it is not a hosted SaaS and not a payment executor — side-effects are descriptors (Boundary-A), no network calls.
